title: euphorbia atoto
intro: Euphorbia atoto, also known as the "Coral Cactus" or "Woolly Coral Cactus", is a succulent plant native to New Zealand, characterized by its coral-like stems and woolly leaves. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of alkaloids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Euphorbia atoto include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a valuable plant in traditional medicine. The plant is often prepared as a tincture or infusion, and its herbal preparations have been used to treat various health conditions, including skin infections and wounds.
